name: @chbrain/khai-engine-third-place
description: khai third-place engine — the informal public gathering place that hosts community life on neutral ground
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The informal public gathering place that hosts community life on neutral ground.

card.wire: Link the scene's third place to the anchor; link the specific facet (neutral-ground, leveler, or home-away) to the expression under Projection.
card.issue: What does this place make available to a persona that home and work do not?
card.require: A recurring venue with regulars, open to whoever enters without invitation; conversation as the primary activity.
card.enforce: Do not model the formal rite that first admitted a persona among the regulars; that belongs to the ritual engine. This engine models the neutral-ground venue itself, not the rite of entry.
card.setup: Name which facet is load-bearing for the scene -- the ground's neutrality, its leveling of outside status, or its resemblance to home -- and who counts as a regular here.
